title: TOWNSHIP, RANGE, AND SECTION LINES,
doc_html:
CHAPTER 3.  TOWNSHIP, RANGE, AND SECTION LINES,

CORNERS AND STATIONS

PART I.  SURVEYS BY STATE

§121.  Reasons for surveys

The Register of the State Land Office may cause surveys and resurveys to be made, in order to establish or re-establish township lines, range lines, section lines, corners, and half-mile stations, where the original monuments have been destroyed or lost or are uncertain, or where the lines, corners, or stations were never actually established.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 3.  TOWNSHIP, RANGE, AND SECTION LINES,
CORNERS AND STATIONS
PART I.  SURVEYS BY STATE
§121.  Reasons for surveys
The Register of the State Land Office may cause surveys and resurveys to be made, in order to establish or re-establish township lines, range lines, section lines, corners, and half-mile stations, where the original monuments have been destroyed or lost or are uncertain, or where the lines, corners, or stations were never actually established.
